games.name: Match Dot Puzzle Game
games.description: Match Dot Puzzle Game is a fun, relaxing, and brain-training puzzle game designed for players of all ages. In this game, your goal is to match colorful dots by connecting them in the correct way. Each level presents a new challenge that tests your logic, focus, and problem-solving skills. This dot puzzle game is easy to play but becomes more challenging as you progress. With smooth controls and clean visuals, players can enjoy a calm yet engaging puzzle experience. The simple design makes it perfect for casual players, while the increasing difficulty keeps puzzle lovers entertained for hours.

games.name: Crash Plan
games.description: Crash Plane is an addictive arcade flying game inspired by classic one-tap games. Control a burning plane and keep it in the air by tapping the screen while avoiding deadly obstacles and incoming bullets. The plane is already on fire, and every hit makes survival harder. Fly through changing weather conditions, including heavy rain, while reacting fast to enemy bullets and dangerous pipes. The longer you survive, the higher your score. Simple controls, fast gameplay, and increasing difficulty make Crash Plane easy to play but hard to master. How long can you survive in the sky?
games.instructions: Tap Click to fly upward Release to fall down Avoid bullets
